How to build tUME                                          June 18, 2000 
----------------- 
One-time system configuration steps 
----------------------------------- 
1. Install Echidna Game Generation System libraries. (e.g., C:\EGGS) 
   NB: tUME has NOT yet been updated to work with the most recent 
   version of EGGS. To build tUME, you must use the version of EGGS 
   included in the tUME source code distribution. The current version 
   of EGGS may be found at http://www.greggman.com/ 

2. tUME requires Borland C Compiler 3.1 and Borland Turbo Assembler 3.1. 
   Make sure your PATH includes the directories that contain BCC & TASM. 

3. Tell Borland C Compiler about the EGGS header files include directory. 
   One way is to do this is to add a TURBOC.CFG file to your \BC\BIN 
   directory. An example TURBOC.CFG contains these three lines: 

-ID:\BC\INCLUDE
-ID:\BC\CLASSLIB\INCLUDE
-ID:\EGGS\INCLUDE

4. Update TUMEVARS.BAT so CLIB refers to the Borland C libraries 
   directory (e.g., set CLIB=C:\BC\LIB), and ELIB refers to the EGGS 
   library directory (e.g., set ELIB=C:\EGGS\LIB). 

5. Unzip tUMESRC.ZIP into a directory. E.g., C:\SRC\TUME. 

Building tUME
-------------
1. Build the EGGS libraries. 
2. CD C:\SRC\TUME. 
3. Type BUILD to execute the BUILD.BAT batch file.
